audit_items.proof_trace: hash.c contains no null checks, but the calling convention enforced by all callers in schema_init.c ensures pointers are never NULL: ctx is always the address of a stack-local variable (never NULL), digest is always a stack-allocated array (never NULL), and buf in Update functions is either an address-of-local, a properly-initialized schema OID string, or a BerVal whose bv_val is guarded non-NULL by the BER_BVISNULL loop condition before being passed in.
